dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) Price bounces above support level (s1 pivot) indicating reversal confirmation, (2) Minimum 1.5% bounce from low measured via returns, (3) RSI divergence detected by RSI < 30 indicating oversold reversal. Exit: Take profits at resistance (r1 pivot). Stop loss set 1.5% below entry based on bounce_threshold_percent parameter. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as rule applies to both upside reversals from support and downside reversals from resistance. Target regime limited to TRENDING as specified.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) Price bounces above support level (s1 pivot) indicating reversal confirmation, (2) Minimum 1.5% bounce from low measured via returns, (3) RSI divergence detected by RSI < 30 indicating oversold reversal. Exit: Take profits at resistance (r1 pivot). Stop loss set 1.5% below entry based on bounce_threshold_percent parameter. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as rule applies to both upside reversals from support and downside reversals from resistance. Target regime limited to TRENDING as specified.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter a position only after technical confirmation of a key level reversal, not at the level itself, even if fundamentally attractive—patience for double confirmation reduces emotional risk and drawdown.
